name: Vajhira
bio:
Physical Appearance: Khajiit female. Feline features characteristic of her race. Wears a rare forester's shirt, laced leather pants, and rough leather shoes - practical attire for a hunter.
Race: Khajiit
Personality Keywords: devout, dedicated, knowledgeable
Role: Vajhira is a hunter and devout worshipper of Hircine, the Daedric Prince of the Hunt. She lives at the shrine alongside fellow worshippers Hunting Tail and Boroneth, and can provide information about Hircine's preferences.
Home Location Information: Hircine's Shrine, where Vajhira lives in constant worship and devotion.
Daily Routine: Vajhira spends day and night worshipping at Hircine's Shrine, either wandering around or sitting on one of the benches. She never leaves.
Equipment: Vajhira wields an iron bow with arrows and carries an iron dagger as backup. She also carries a small amount of gold.
Personality - The Devoted Hunter: Vajhira has dedicated her life to worshipping Hircine at the shrine, spending all her time there either wandering or sitting on benches. She possesses knowledge about Hircine's preferences, particularly regarding pelts, and shares this information with those who seek it.
author: Bethesda
